description: TENANT_TIERS contains exactly ['pro', 'premium']
TenantTier type only accepts 'pro' | 'premium'
TIER_LABELS maps pro→'Pro', premium→'Premium'
isValidTier returns true for 'pro', 'premium'
isValidTier returns false for null, undefined, '', 'invalid', 'basic', 'test'
resolveTier('pro') returns { tier: 'pro', isMisconfigured: false }
resolveTier('premium') returns { tier: 'premium', isMisconfigured: false }
resolveTier(null) returns { tier: 'pro', isMisconfigured: true }
resolveTier(undefined) returns { tier: 'pro', isMisconfigured: true }
resolveTier('invalid') returns { tier: 'pro', isMisconfigured: true }
resolveTier('basic') returns { tier: 'pro', isMisconfigured: true }
TIER_FEATURES enum contains INVOICE_DESIGNER
TIER_FEATURE_MAP: pro tier has no gated features (empty array)
TIER_FEATURE_MAP: premium tier includes INVOICE_DESIGNER
tierHasFeature('premium', INVOICE_DESIGNER) returns true
tierHasFeature('pro', INVOICE_DESIGNER) returns false
FEATURE_MINIMUM_TIER maps INVOICE_DESIGNER→'premium'
Tier types, functions, and add-on utilities are exported from @alga-psa/types
ITenant.plan accepts TenantTier values and addons accepts string array
Test data factory creates tenants with plan='pro'
STRIPE_PRODUCT_TIER_MAP maps 'alga-psa-preview' → 'pro'
STRIPE_PRODUCT_TIER_MAP maps future products: alga-psa-pro→pro, alga-psa-premium→premium
tierFromStripeProduct('alga-psa-preview') returns 'pro'
tierFromStripeProduct('unknown-product') returns 'pro' (default)
assertTierAccess throws TierAccessError for pro tenant accessing INVOICE_DESIGNER
assertTierAccess does not throw for premium tenant accessing INVOICE_DESIGNER
assertTierAccess throws for NULL plan tenant (misconfigured → pro, but still no INVOICE_DESIGNER)
ITenant.plan accepts TenantTier values in server duplicate interface
CE self-registration creates tenant with plan='pro' (first insert path)
CE self-registration creates tenant with plan='pro' (second insert path)
Backfill migration sets plan='pro' for tenants with NULL plan
Backfill migration sets plan='pro' for tenants with empty string plan
Backfill migration does not modify tenants that already have a valid plan
tenant_addons table is created with correct schema (tenant, addon_key PK)
JWT contains plan field after login
Session.user contains plan field
JWT plan is fetched from tenants table on initial sign-in (first auth path)
JWT plan is fetched from tenants table on initial sign-in (second auth path)
JWT plan refreshes after 5 minutes on subsequent requests
JWT plan does NOT refresh before 5 minutes have elapsed
TierProvider reads tier from session and provides it via context
useTier() returns correct tier value for pro tenant
useTier().isMisconfigured is false for valid plan, true for NULL/invalid
useTier().hasFeature(INVOICE_DESIGNER) returns false for pro, true for premium
refreshTier() triggers session update for instant plan propagation
TierProvider is mounted inside AppSessionProvider in MspLayoutClient
createTenantInDB sets plan from Stripe product when stripePriceId is provided
handleCheckoutCompleted resolves product to tier and updates tenants.plan
handleSubscriptionUpdated resolves product to tier and updates tenants.plan
UpsellPlaceholder renders icon, heading with feature name and tier label
UpsellPlaceholder CTA button links to /msp/account
TierGate renders children when tenant has required feature
TierGate renders UpsellPlaceholder when tenant lacks required feature
ServerTierGate renders children when tenant has required feature
ServerTierGate bypasses gating in CE edition
Invoice Designer visual tab shows UpsellPlaceholder for pro tenant
Invoice Designer visual tab works normally for premium tenant
Save button disabled for pro tenant in InvoiceTemplateEditor
saveInvoiceTemplate server action rejects pro tenant with TierAccessError
deleteInvoiceTemplate server action rejects pro tenant with TierAccessError
Account page shows actual tier name with badge
Account page shows misconfiguration alert when plan is NULL
Account page shows tier features list from TIER_FEATURE_MAP
E2E: Pro tenant sees Invoice Designer as UpsellPlaceholder, premium tenant sees designer
E2E: Changing plan from pro to premium unlocks Invoice Designer after session refresh
E2E: NULL plan shows warning banner and defaults to pro features
